programs.title: Security
programs.desc: A security guard protects an eleven-year-old girl who is being targeted by a gang.

programs.title: The Kill Room
programs.desc: An art dealer teams up with a hit man and his boss for a money-laundering scheme.

programs.desc: Four young men take a wrong turn in Chicago and find danger as witnesses to murder.

programs.title: The Wraith
programs.desc: Mysterious turbo driver (Charlie Sheen) drag-races hot rodder (Nick Cassavetes) in desert.

programs.title: City of Industry
programs.desc: Retired thief (Harvey Keitel) joins brother for a final heist.

programs.title: The Way of the Gun
programs.desc: Career criminals (Ryan Phillippe, Benicio del Toro) kidnap a surrogate mother.
